title: prangos asperula subsp. haussknechtii
intro: Prangos asperula subsp. haussknechtii is a plant species in the carrot family, known for its unique properties and uses. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Prangos asperula subsp. haussknechtii can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
